Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Ichun Howeler's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $312.50 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
